sprint.goal: KE-9: New governance invariant design — browser agents (#1384), irreversible action detection (#1385), dogfood fix (#1473)

senior.title: feat: irreversible action detection — human confirmation gates for one-way operations
senior.note: No PR yet after 3 EM cycles. PauseRequested/PauseResolved schema already in packages/events/src/schema.ts. Start: irreversible flag on canonical action model (packages/core/src/actions.ts), kernel pause hook in packages/kernel/src/decision.ts. Also assigned #1473 fix (OPERATIONAL_STATE_PATTERNS exemption — low-risk, pair with #1385 PR).

secondary.title: feat: browser governance invariants — scope, state, and pacing for browser agents
secondary.note: No PR after 3 EM cycles. Design doc needed before implementation. Decisions: browser.* action class vs shell.exec extension; URL scope invariant shape; pacing invariant + correction engine interaction. Coordinate with kernel architect.

blockers.title: [dogfood] no-governance-self-modification blocks EM squad state writes to .agentguard/squads/
blockers.fix: Narrow OPERATIONAL_STATE_PATTERNS in packages/invariants/src/definitions.ts to exclude .agentguard/squads/**

healthReason: #1473 blocker persists (open 6 days, director escalation unresolved). #1384 and #1385 in design phase 3+ EM cycles — no implementation PRs. 0 open PRs. Tests 4693/4693.
